summary: All iteration 19 features tested and working. Verified: (1) Chat 'View lead' link navigates to /leads?detail={lead_id}, (2) Collapsible channel sections (Channels, Lead Discussions) with chevron toggles, (3) Archive button visible for admins in chat header, (4) PUT /api/chat/channels/{id}/archive endpoint works, (5) Contacts page with full CRUD and rich profile editing, (6) POST /api/leads/{id}/convert-to-contact creates contact from lead, (7) Lead status 'converted' is set after conversion, (8) Tasks page still shows assignee on cards and has 'All Owners' filter.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/contacts returns list of contacts
Backend: POST /api/contacts creates contact with all fields (decision_maker, budget, timeline, pain_points)
Backend: GET /api/contacts/{id} returns single contact
Backend: PUT /api/contacts/{id} updates contact fields including sales-specific fields
Backend: DELETE /api/contacts/{id} removes contact
Backend: POST /api/leads/{id}/convert-to-contact creates contact from lead with all data
Backend: Lead status set to 'converted' after conversion
Backend: PUT /api/chat/channels/{id}/archive archives channel (admin only)
Backend: Archived channels not returned in GET /api/chat/channels
Backend: GET /api/tasks returns tasks with assigned_to field
Backend: GET /api/tasks?assigned_to=xxx filters by assignee
Frontend: Chat sidebar has collapsible 'CHANNELS' section with chevron toggle
Frontend: Chat sidebar has collapsible 'LEAD DISCUSSIONS' section with chevron toggle
Frontend: Clicking 'View lead' link navigates to /leads?detail={lead_id}
Frontend: Lead detail dialog auto-opens from URL ?detail= parameter
Frontend: Archive button visible for admin in chat header (non-general channels)
Frontend: Contacts page accessible via sidebar nav link
Frontend: Contacts page shows list with company, email, decision maker badge
Frontend: Contact detail dialog has Edit button

Frontend: Contact edit mode has all fields: first_name, last_name, email, phone, company, job_title, linkedin, website, location, industry, company_size, budget, timeline, preferred_contact, decision_maker toggle, pain_points textarea, notes
Frontend: Contact edit mode has Save Changes and Cancel buttons
Frontend: Tasks page shows 'All Owners' filter dropdown
Frontend: Task cards display assignee name (Florian)
seed_data_creation: Test data cleaned up. 1 contact 'John155321 Doe155321' remains from previous iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 19 features verified working: Chat collapsible sections, View lead navigation with ?detail= param, Archive channel for admins, Contacts CRUD with rich sales fields (decision_maker, budget, timeline, pain_points), Lead to Contact conversion sets status to 'converted', Tasks page has owner filter and shows assignee on cards.

chat_view_lead_link.navigation: Click 'View lead' in chat header -> navigates to /leads?detail={lead_id}
chat_view_lead_link.auto_open: Lead detail dialog opens automatically from URL parameter

contact_detail_dialog.enrichment: Shows AI enrichment section if available

lead_to_contact_conversion.optional_param: deal_id to link contact to deal
lead_to_contact_conversion.lead_status_update: Lead status set to 'converted' after conversion
lead_to_contact_conversion.ui_trigger: Dropdown menu option 'Convert to Contact' for qualified leads

tasks_regression.owner_filter: All Owners dropdown visible in filter section
